title: Cheesy Polish Pierogi Bake
description: A twist on the classic pierogi, this casserole-style dish combines traditional polish flavors with a cheesy, baked twist.
instructions: Cook pierogi according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook sliced polish sausage over medium-high heat until browned, then set aside.
In the same skillet, sauté chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add cooked pierogi, soy sauce (if using), and cooked polish sausage back into the skillet. Toss to combine.
Transfer the pierogi mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle shredded cheddar and mozzarella cheese over the top of the pierogi mixture.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
